steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The goal is explicit: indicate the year the Schomburg Center was founded. This single criterion determines which note to emphasize.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C states “The Schomburg Center was founded in 1925,” which directly indicates the year. Choices A, B, and D provide information about the center's name, nature as a research library, and location, respectively—none of which address the founding year. This matches choice C — C is correct.
